calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-13-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Nameof a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Petitioner: Peter T.Y. Au, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Qi Cong Ou.
Li Wang, the Minor's mother is also present, and consenting to the name change.
Parties were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Anson Q.C. Au.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Reset To Dec-13-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Petitioner: Peter Au, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Qi Cong Ou, was sworn and examined.
Declaration of Minor's Mother consenting to name change, received and filed in court.
After examining the Petitioner, matter is continued to Dec. 13, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for a Notorized Declaration from the Minor's Mother or appearance.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-29-2005 Reset To Dec-06-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Peter T.Y. Au, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Qi Cong Ou, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Mother consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Dec. 6, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for Minor's Mother to submit a declaration consenting to the name chaange.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
